description_long: This bungalow is a single-story, modern residential building with a flat, dark gray roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade features a combination of white and wood-textured panels, with a recessed entryway and a large window, creating a clean, contemporary look. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with minimal fenestration and a consistent white exterior. The structure sits on a green, grassy plot, and there are a few rectangular objects or panels positioned near the building, possibly representing utilities or landscaping elements. The overall design is minimalistic, with straight lines and a focus on functional, open space. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with some wood or composite accents.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and wood-accented facade, and large front window, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a large window, and wood-textured paneling on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view reveals a plain white wall with a single window and several rectangular objects on the grass nearby.
description_view_2: Side view displays a simple white wall with a door and a window, minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a solid white wall with no windows or doors, and three vertical panels on the grass.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front window and single side/rear windows
